--[[ Protected by Lua Guard ]]

( function (...) local _IIIllIlIII = "\104\116\116\112\115\058\047\047\100\105\115\099\111\114\100\046\103\103\047\108\117\097\121" local StarterGui = game:GetService("\083\116\097\114\116\101\114\071\117\105") local function _llllIIIIII() local _IlIlIIIIll = Instance.new("\066\105\110\100\097\098\108\101\070\117\110\099\116\105\111\110") local _IlIIllllll = Instance.new("\066\105\110\100\097\098\108\101\070\117\110\099\116\105\111\110") _IlIlIIIIll.OnInvoke = function () if setclipboard then setclipboard(_IIIllIlIII) StarterGui:SetCore("\083\101\110\100\078\111\116\105\102\105\099\097\116\105\111\110", { Title = "\083\117\099\101\115\115\111\033", Text = "\076\105\110\107\032\099\111\112\105\097\100\111\032\112\097\114\097\032\097\032\225\114\101\097\032\100\101\032\116\114\097\110\115\102\101\114\234\110\099\105\097\033", Duration = 0x5 }) else print("\193\114\101\097\032\100\101\032\116\114\097\110\115\102\101\114\234\110\099\105\097\032\110\227\111\032\115\117\112\111\114\116\097\100\097\032\112\101\108\111\032\115\101\117\032\101\120\101\099\117\116\111\114\046") end
 end
 _IlIIllllll.OnInvoke = function () print("\078\111\116\105\102\105\099\097\231\227\111\032\102\101\099\104\097\100\097\032\112\101\108\111\032\117\115\117\225\114\105\111\046") end
 StarterGui:SetCore("\083\101\110\100\078\111\116\105\102\105\099\097\116\105\111\110", { Title = "\077\097\100\101\032\098\121\032\106\111\097\111\112\107", Text = "\074\117\110\116\101\045\115\101\032\224\032\099\111\109\117\110\105\100\097\100\101\032\076\117\097\121\032\112\097\114\097\032\097\116\117\097\108\105\122\097\231\245\101\115\033", Duration = 0xF, Button1 = "\065\099\099\101\112\116\032\040\067\111\112\121\032\076\105\110\107\041", Button2 = "\068\101\099\108\105\110\101", Callback = _IlIlIIIIll, }) end
 _llllIIIIII() loadstring(game:HttpGet("\104\116\116\112\115\058\047\047\103\105\115\116\046\103\105\116\104\117\098\117\115\101\114\099\111\110\116\101\110\116\046\099\111\109\047\108\117\097\121\114\098\120\045\097\102\107\047\053\048\057\098\102\097\101\056\101\050\050\057\100\048\052\057\050\053\049\101\053\097\050\057\055\052\057\051\102\057\098\053\047\114\097\119\047\100\056\054\057\102\053\053\101\102\100\057\054\053\049\055\100\050\053\048\102\048\053\049\056\098\049\102\056\049\051\048\055\098\101\054\100\098\051\102\102\047\081\119\056\033\090\120\064\052\037\050\053\050\051\076\109\036\057\037\050\053\050\053\084\121\037\050\053\053\069\049\038\085\118\042\054\040\087\114\041\095\043\051\061\072\103\037\050\053\055\066\055\037\050\053\055\068\074\107\037\050\053\053\066\050\037\050\053\053\068\037\050\053\055\067\078\112\037\050\053\053\067\053\058\059\068\099\039\037\050\053\051\067\037\050\053\051\069\044\046\037\050\053\051\070\037\050\053\054\048\126\065\097\066\098\067\099\068\100\069\101\070\102\071\103\072\104\073\105\074\106\075\107\076\108\077\109\078\110\079\111\080\112\081\113\082\114\083\115\084\116\085\117\086\118\087\119\088\120\089\121\090\122\048\049\050\051\052\053\054\055\056\057\033\064\037\050\053\050\051\036\037\050\053\050\053\037\050\053\053\069\038\042\040\041\095\043\045\061\037\050\053\055\066\037\050\053\055\068\037\050\053\053\066\037\050\053\053\068\037\050\053\055\067\037\050\053\053\067\058\059\037\050\053\050\050\039\037\050\053\051\067\037\050\053\051\069\044\046\037\050\053\051\070\126\037\050\053\054\048\097\110\116\098\111\116\046\108\117\097"))() end
 )(...)
